document.title: FFC CABLE ASSY approval sheet and detailed specification for Code No. 3809-003167
document.documentType: Approval sheet, request for approval, detailed specification, inspection data, and environmental substance documentation
document.revisionOrVersion: Rev00; revision history also lists Rev 01 dated 2021.05.14

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and specification package for HE HUI FFC Cable Assy Code No. 3809-003167, including UL style, electrical, mechanical, environmental, packing, and hazardous substance data.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports component approval, technical material submission to Samsung Electronics, process quality control, inspection, UL compliance reference, and environmental substance warranty.
keyPoints: The component is identified as FFC Cable Assy, Code No. 3809-003167, HF P/N FT12-16Y540XXE-SAX, Maker P/N HF20-TV-117.
The specification applies to FFC Cable Connector ASS'Y manufactured and supplied by FOSHAN HEHUI Electronics Co., Ltd.
UL certified product compliance is stated with UL number E248682 and style 20624 rated 80℃ and 60V.

Electrical requirements include conductor resistance Max.1020mΩ, insulation resistance more than 100MΩ at DC500V 1min, withstanding voltage no breakdown at AC500V 1min, and contact resistance MAX NH(30mΩ).
Environmental testing includes heat resistance, cold resistance, humidity resistance, temperature cycling, and salt mist spray.
Environmental substance documentation states compliance with relevant international regulations and Samsung Environmental Standards 0QA-2049.

evidence.claim: The specification applies to FFC Cable Connector ASS'Y manufactured and supplied by FOSHAN HEHUI Electronics Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: This specification is applied to the FFC Cable Connector ASS'Y of manufacture and supply by the FOSHAN HEHUI Electronics Co., Ltd..

evidence.claim: The product is described as UL certified with UL number E248682, including style 20624.
evidence.evidenceText: Shall comply with UL certified product. Our products UL number is E248682, including style 20624

evidence.claim: UL20624 is rated 80℃ and 60V with ROHS remark.
evidence.evidenceText: UL20624 80℃ 60V ROHS

evidence.claim: Reference documents include MIL-STD-202, MIL-STD-1344A, EIA-364, UL 94, and UL 498.
evidence.evidenceText: Reference document A) MIL-STD-202 ... B) MIL-STD-1344A ... C) EIA-364 ... D) UL 94 ... E) UL 498

evidence.claim: Electrical specification requires conductor resistance Max.1020mΩ.
evidence.evidenceText: Conductor Resistance ... Max.1020mΩ

evidence.claim: Electrical specification requires insulation resistance more than 100MΩ at DC500V for 1 minute.
evidence.evidenceText: Insulation Resistance ... More than 100MΩ (DC500V, 1min)

evidence.claim: Electrical specification requires withstanding voltage with no breakdown at AC500V for 1 minute, 10mA.
evidence.evidenceText: Withstanding Voltage ... No Breakdown (AC500V, 1min, 10mA)

evidence.claim: Contact resistance specification is MAX NH(30mΩ).
evidence.evidenceText: Contact resistance ... MAX NH(30mΩ)

evidence.claim: Product weight requirement is 3.04g.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Weight A unit weight measure 3.04g

evidence.claim: Environmental specification includes heat resistance at 85±3°C for 96 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: Heat Resistance Subject product to 85±3°C for 96 hours continuously

evidence.claim: Environmental specification includes cold resistance at -40±3°C for 96 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: Cold Resistance Subject product to -40±3°C for 96 hours continuously

evidence.claim: Environmental specification includes humidity resistance for 96 hours at 60℃±3℃ and 95%RH.
evidence.evidenceText: Humidity Resistance Subject product to 96 Hours at 60℃±3℃ 95%RH

evidence.claim: Salt mist spray condition is 5% salt solution at 35℃ for 72 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: Salt Mist Spray 5% Solution Of Salt, 35℃ 72Hour

evidence.claim: Gold plating uses nickel and gold electroplating on bare copper wires.
evidence.evidenceText: Gold plating FFC is laminated with bare copper wires and electroplated with nickel(Ni) and gold(Au) in order.

evidence.claim: The material list identifies conductor, insulation film, supporting tape, and double side adhesive materials.
evidence.evidenceText: Material List No. Item Maker P/N Metrical Vendor Remark 1 Conductor ... 2 Insulation Film ... 3 Supporting Tape ... 4 Double side adhesive

evidence.claim: The company warrants compliance with relevant international regulations concerning substances with environmental impacts.
evidence.evidenceText: Company complies with all relevant international regulations concerning the substances with environmental impacts.

evidence.claim: The company warrants compliance with Samsung Environmental Standards 0QA-2049.
evidence.evidenceText: Company complies with the Samsung Electronics Standards for Control of Substances with Environmental Impacts within Products("Samsung Environmental Standards, 0QA-2049")

evidence.claim: The letter of warranty is effective from 2021.05.06 to 2022.05.06 and automatically renews unless objected to.
evidence.evidenceText: This Letter shall be effective from 2021.05.06. to 2022.05.06 , and thereafter,shall be automatically renewed for each additional year unless SEC or Company objects such renewal in writing at least a month prior to an expiration date.

evidence.claim: Packing method specifies 200pcs per bag, 800pcs per tray, and 3200pcs per box.
evidence.evidenceText: 200pcs 200pcs*4bag=800pcs 800pcs*4tray=3200PCS

reviewFlags.reason: FDA appears only as source metadata authoritySignal and is not present in the source text; it was not extracted as an authority.
Approval Date field in the component approval sheet is blank, although other sections show 2021.05.06 signatures and dates.
Revision metadata is conflicting or mixed: Request for Approval states Reference Rev00, while revision history lists Rev 01 dated 2021.05.14.
Source text includes OCR or transcription defects such as 'Factroy', 'Teating', 'Interna', and malformed resistance text; extracted values use clearer repeated specification lines where available.

Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous because the source contains UL standards, Samsung customer requirements, Korean arbitration venue, and U.S. military standards, but no single regulatory approval authority.
